calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Hearing Re Administrative Subpoenas
Off Calendar Feb-28-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Elliot Beckelman, Esq. of the Department of Industrial Relations, Tel. 415.703.4877, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Order To Show Cause Hearing Re Administrative Subpoenas - A hearing was required per GC 11188. There being no appearance nor opposition filed by respondent, the Court grants petitioner's application and orders respondent to comply with the administrative subpoenas. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
